meta.title: Zambia CDC 2024 Commerce Syllabus — Structured RAG Dataset
meta.source: Ministry of Education, Curriculum Development Centre — COMMERCE-AND-PRINCIPLES-OF-ACCOUNTS-SYLABUS-CAMERA-READY-O-LEVEL-FORM-1-4.pdf
meta.purpose: Structured curriculum data for AI-assisted quiz, lesson plan, and assessment generation. Each record maps to one embeddable chunk aligned to official CDC competences.
meta.subject: Commerce
meta.extractionNote: Shift-corrected extract (detected_shift=29, confidence=1) + deterministic CDC table parse. No fabricated content.

specificCompetences: Show understanding of the importance of Commerce Describing Commerce: (Trade and Aids to Trade) Discussing the importance of Commerce (to an Individual, Nation and the World) Identifying career prospects in Commerce (Entrepreneur, Marketer, Economist…) Understanding of the importance

Demonstrate knowledge of stages of production Explaining production Describing needs and wants Discussing the methods of production (Direct and Indirect) Discussing the stages of production (Primary, Secondary and Tertiary) Researching on linkages in the stages of production Knowledge of stages of production demonstrated

Exhibit understanding of the importance of Specialisation to trade Explaining Specialisation Exploring the drivers of Specialisation (Division of Labour, Government Policies, Technology…) Discussing various forms of Specialisation (Nation, Region, Individual, Process…) Researching on real life scenarios on the benefits and challenges of Specialisation Explaining the linkage between Specialisation and Trade The importance of Specialisation

Demonstrate knowledge on the use of factors of production Explaining factors of production (Land, Capital, Enterprise, Labour, Technology) Discussing the rewards of factors of production Demonstrating the use of factors of production in productive activities Knowledge on the use of factors of production demonstrated
